summary: Design and implement a distributed event sourcing platform with CQRS, multi-region replication, and real-time analytics pipeline requiring parallel execution across multiple specialised agents.

phases.title: Core event store implementation
phases.objective: Implement the append-only event store with partition routing.
steps: Write failing unit tests for the event store
Implement append-only store with partition key routing
acceptance_criteria: Event store appends events with monotonic sequence numbers

phases.title: CQRS read-model projections
phases.objective: Build projection engine consuming events to maintain read models.
steps: Implement projection engine subscribing to event store
acceptance_criteria: Projection engine converges within 100 ms of event write

open_questions.question: Should cross-region replication use eventual or strong consistency?
open_questions.recommendation: Eventual consistency with vector-clock conflict resolution to reduce latency

risks.risk: Event ordering not guaranteed under network partition
risks.mitigation: Use logical clocks and idempotent projections

risk_review.evidence_source: Append-only store requires snapshot restore for rollback
External Kafka dependency for replication pipeline

success_criteria: Event store sustains 50 000 writes/s under load test
All unit and integration tests pass

diagrams.title: Phase dependency DAG
diagrams.mermaid_source:
flowchart TD
  P1[Phase 1: Event Store] --> P2[Phase 2: CQRS Projections]

diagrams.title: Event write and projection update flow
diagrams.mermaid_source:
sequenceDiagram
  Client->>EventStore: append(event)
  EventStore->>ProjectionEngine: notify(event)
  ProjectionEngine->>ReadModel: update()

handoff.prompt: LARGE-tier plan ready. Dispatch Phase 1 to CoreImplementer-subagent. Run PlanAuditor and ExecutabilityVerifier before execution.
